decision2_substring: when the inspiratory flow drops below a setable fraction of the peak flow (Expiratory Trigger Setting)
output_structured_natural_language: whenever PSVMode, whenever l1_lessThan_ExpiratoryTriggerSensitivity, at the next timepoint satisfy expiratoryPhase

explanation: The requirement states that the expiration phase begins when both the system is in PSV mode AND the inspiratory flow drops below a setable fraction of the peak flow. decision1 indicates no overarching temporal context for the entire requirement, treating the entire 'In PSV mode ... when flow drops' as a single triggering condition. decision2 captures this conjunctive trigger condition using 'upon'. decision3 ensures that expiratoryPhaseStart occurs immediately upon this trigger.
decision2_substring: In PSV mode the expiration phase shall start when the inspiratory flow drops below a setable fraction of the peak flow (Expiratory Trigger Setting)
output_structured_natural_language: upon PSVMode & V_E_lessThan_ExpiratoryTriggerSensitivity_multiplyBy_PeakV_E, immediately satisfy expiratoryPhaseStart
